item.title: Famitsu Sales: 3/2/26 – 3/8/26
item.content:encoded:
• PS4
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

Pokemon Pokopia sells 541,371 retail copies in first week.

Famitsu has published its estimated physical game software data for Japan for the week of March 2, 2026 to March 8, 2026.

Pokemon Pokopia for Switch 2 was the highest selling new game release last week, debuting at 541,371 retail copies sold.

On the hardware side, Switch 2 sold 127,508 units, the Switch family sold 23,770 units, the PlayStation 5 family sold 16,819 units, the Xbox Series family sold 486 units, and the PlayStation 4 family sold 29 units.

Get the full sales charts below.

Software Sales (followed by lifetime sales)

  1. [SW2] Pokemon Pokopia (The Pokemon Company, 03/05/26) – 541,371 (New)
  2. [PS5] Resident Evil Requiem (Capcom, 02/27/26) – 23,459 (178,832)
  3. [SW2] Mario Kart World (Nintendo, 06/05/25) – 10,023 (2,856,782)
  4. [SW2] Mario Tennis Fever (Nintendo, 02/12/26) – 9,626 (75,831)
  5. [SW2] Resident Evil Requiem (Capcom, 02/27/26) – 6,562 (45,355)
  6. [NSW] Animal Crossing: New Horizons (Nintendo, 03/20/20) – 6,405 (8,397,297)
  7. [SW2] Dragon Quest VII Reimagined (Square Enix, 02/05/26) – 5,594 (208,364)
  8. [SW2] Animal Crossing: New Horizons – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition (Nintendo, 01/15/26) – 5,074 (83,595)
  9. [NSW] Dragon Quest VII Reimagined (Square Enix, 02/05/26) – 5,026 (236,744)
  10. [NSW] Minecraft (Microsoft, 06/21/18) – 4,667 (4,164,389)

Rankings 11 to 30 will be announced on March 13.

  1. [SW2] Back to the Dawn (Clouded Leopard Entertainment, 03/05/26) – (New)
  2. [PS5] Tokyo Xtreme Racer (Genki, 02/26/26) –
  3. [NSW] Tales of Berseria Remastered (Bandai Namco, 02/26/26) –
  4. [PS5] Tales of Berseria Remastered (Bandai Namco, 02/26/26) –
  5. [SW2] Pokemon Legends: Z-A – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition (The Pokemon Company, 10/16/25) –
  6. [NSW] City Hunter (SUNSOFT< 02/26/26) –
  7. [NSW] Pokemon Legends: Z-A (The Pokemon Company, 10/16/25) –
  8. [PS5] Yakuza Kiwami 3 & Dark Ties (SEGA, 02/12/26) –
  9. [SW2] Super Mario Party Jamboree – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Jamboree TV (Nintendo, 07/24/25) –
  10. [PS5] Dragon Quest VII Reimagined (Square Enix, 02/05/26) –
  11. [NSW] Raiden Fighters Remix Collection (MOSS, 02/26/26) –
  12. [SW2] Kirby Air Riders (Nintendo, 11/20/25) –
  13. [SW2] Momotaro Dentetsu 2: Anata no Machi mo Kitto Aru – Higashi Nihon Hen + Nishi Nihon Hen – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition (Konami, 11/13/25) –
  14. [PS5] Nioh 3 (Koei Tecmo, 02/06/26) –
  15. [NSW] Momotaro Dentetsu 2: Anata no Machi mo Kitto Aru – Higashi Nihon Hen + Nishi Nihon Hen (Konami, 11/13/25) –
  16. [NSW] Resident Evil 30th Special Pack (Capcom, 02/27/26) –
  17. [SW2] Donkey Kong Bananza (Nintendo, 07/17/25) –
  18. [NSW] Mario Kart 8 Deluxe (Nintendo, 04/28/17) –
  19. [NSW] Maid Cafe on Electric Street (PLAYISM, 02/26/26) –
  20. [NSW] Super Mario Party Jamboree (Nintendo, 10/17/24) –
  21. [NSW] Super Smash Bros. Ultimate (Nintendo, 12/07/18) –
  22. [SW2] Yakuza Kiwami 3 & Dark Ties (SEGA, 02/12/26) –

Hardware Sales (followed by lifetime sales)

  1. Switch 2 – 127,508 (4,707,323)
  2. Switch OLED Model – 10,245 (9,494,064)
  3. PlayStation 5 Digital Edition – 9,569 (1,207,761)
  4. Switch Lite – 7,136 (6,884,867)
  5. Switch – 6,389 (20,248,828)
  6. PlayStation 5 Pro – 3,803 (331,197)
  7. PlayStation 5 – 3,447 (5,901,631)
  8. Xbox Series X – 235 (325,209)
  9. Xbox Series X Digital Edition – 159 (28,565)
  10. Xbox Series S – 92 (341,285)
  11. PlayStation 4 – 29 (7,930,365)

Update 9:09 p.m.: Famitsu has published the top 11 to 30 game software sales, which have been added to the post.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/famitsu-sales-3-2-26-3-8-26
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Crimson Desert launch trailer
item.content:encoded:
About

Crimson Desert is an open-world action-adventure game set in the beautiful yet brutal continent of Pywel. Take on the role of the Greymane Kliff and embark on a journey across the continent to reclaim everything you’ve lost. Explore uncharted lands, encounter mysterious factions, and experience firsthand a world that is as breathtaking as it is merciless.

During a brutal attack by the Black Bears, Kliff loses his Greymane comrades, his family in all but name.

Amid the turmoil that grips the continent of Pywel, he sets out to find the scattered survivors, rebuild the fallen Greymanes, and reclaim the homeland they once called their own.

A Vast, Seamless World

The continent of Pywel, brought to life as a seamless open world, is brimming with countless destinies awaiting your discovery.

One day you may face a trial so harsh it brings you to your knees. The next day you might find yourself captivated by the gentle gaze of an innocent creature.

In this boundless land, even the simplest request could set you on the path to a fateful encounter and reveal an unexpected truth.

May Solumen’s blessing guide you on your journey across the living, breathing expanse of Pywel.

Relentless Action, Brutal Combat

On the unforgiving battlefields of Crimson Desert, there is no single path to victory.

From swords, spears, bows to powerful abilities and elemental enhancements, take advantage of the wide arsenal of weapons and skills available to you and create lethal combinations to unleash even greater power.

With every strike and move, forge your own way in a world where a split second can decide your fate in fast-paced, visceral battles.

Dawning Fate

On the continent of Pywel, the rival factions of Pailune maintained a tense balance.

At Kliff’s side stood his steadfast Greymane comrades: Oongka, Yann, and Naira.

That fragile peace was shattered with the sudden assault of the Black Bears.

Those Who Fight to Protect, and Those Who Fight to Torment.

The Greymanes fall one by one in their clash against the Black Bears. In a desperate struggle against their fearsome leader Myurdin, Kliff and the few Greymanes who survive are scattered to the winds.

The Beginning of a New Journey

Kliff, etching the names of his fallen companions into his heart, vows to rebuild the Greymanes and exact vengeance upon the Black Bears.
Along this path, he would meet those who seek to upend the very order of the continent and face a mission unlike any he has ever known.

Watch the trailer below.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/crimson-desert-launch-trailer
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
